---
title: "Claude.ai — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import json
import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Claude.ai"
con = duckdb.connect()
for table in ("conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches", "project_metadata", "project_docs"):
    p = PROCESSED / f"claude_ai_{table}.parquet"
    if p.exists():
        con.execute(f"CREATE VIEW {table} AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{p}')")

# Anthropic palette: burnt orange + neutral
SOURCE_COLOR = "#CC785C"     # Anthropic burnt orange
SECONDARY = "#D4A28E"        # claro
ACCENT = "#3D2914"           # marrom escuro pra contraste
MUTED = "#D1D5DB"


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df, **kwargs):
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def plotly_bar(x, y, title, color=SOURCE_COLOR, height=350, orientation="v"):
    if orientation == "h":
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(y=x, x=y, marker_color=color, orientation="h"))
    else:
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=x, y=y, marker_color=color))
    fig.update_layout(
        title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
    )
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches) AS branches,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_metadata) AS projects
""").df()

range_dt = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        MIN(created_at) AS oldest,
        MAX(created_at) AS newest_created,
        MAX(updated_at) AS newest_updated
    FROM conversations
""").df()

_n_docs = 0
try:
    _n_docs = con.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_docs").fetchone()[0]
except Exception:
    pass

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": f"{range_dt['oldest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d} → {range_dt['newest_created'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d}"},
    {"Tabela": "messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "branches.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['branches'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "project_metadata.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['projects'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "project_docs.parquet", "Rows": f"{_n_docs:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
]))
```

> **Sobre este documento.** Catalogo descritivo dos parquets gerados pelo
> parser canonico do Claude.ai (`src/parsers/claude_ai.py`). Apresenta o
> que esta nos dados — schema, cobertura, distribuicoes, preservation.
> **Nao interpreta** conteudo (sem sentiment, clustering, topic detection).
> Pra analise qualitativa, ver projeto `~/Desktop/AI Interaction Analysis/`.
>
> Fonte: pasta unica cumulativa `data/merged/Claude.ai/` (output de
> `scripts/claude-sync.py`).

# 1. Dados disponiveis

Cada uma das 4 tabelas tem schema proprio. Aqui mostramos os campos, sua
cobertura nesta base e amostras diversificadas.

## 1.1 Conversations

A tabela de conversas eh a unidade central. Cada linha representa um
chat do Claude.ai — com seus metadados (titulo, modelo, projeto, datas)
e flags do schema v3 (`is_pinned`, `is_temporary`, `is_preserved_missing`,
`last_seen_in_server`).

```{python}
#| label: conv-schema

cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(title) AS title,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        COUNT(project) AS project,
        COUNT(project_id) AS project_id,
        SUM(is_pinned::INT) AS pinned,
        SUM(is_temporary::INT) AS temporary,
        SUM(is_archived::INT) AS archived,
        SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) AS preserved,
        COUNT(last_seen_in_server) AS last_seen
    FROM conversations
""").df()
total = cov["total"].iloc[0]

def conv_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(cov[field].iloc[0]), int(total))

schema_conv = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "ID unico (UUID do servidor)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "source", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre 'claude_ai'", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "title", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Nome da conv (servidor preenche)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("title")},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Quando a conv foi criada", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "updated_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Ultima msg na conv (rename bumpa, hipotese a validar)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_count", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Mensagens na branch ativa (user+assistant)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "model do ultimo turn (ex: 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929')", "Cobertura": conv_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "mode", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre 'chat' (Claude.ai nao expoe mode no schema)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "project", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Nome do project quando conv pertence a um", "Cobertura": conv_cov("project")},
    {"Campo": "project_id", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "UUID do project (FK pra project_metadata)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("project_id")},
    {"Campo": "is_pinned", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Mapeado de `is_starred` (cross-platform check confirmou)", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['pinned'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_temporary", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Conv 'Temporary chat' — efemera no servidor", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['temporary'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_archived", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Sempre False — Claude.ai nao expoe campo `is_archived`", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['archived'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_preserved_missing", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "True se conv sumiu do servidor (preservada local)", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['preserved'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "last_seen_in_server", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Data da ultima run em que servidor retornou a conv", "Cobertura": conv_cov("last_seen")},
    {"Campo": "url", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Link `https://claude.ai/chat/<uuid>`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
])
show_df(schema_conv)
```

```{python}
#| label: conv-sample
#| column: page

sample_conv = con.execute("""
    WITH
    pinned_sample AS (SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE is_pinned ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1),
    in_project AS (SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE project IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
    standalone AS (SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE project_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
    longest AS (SELECT * FROM conversations ORDER BY message_count DESC LIMIT 1),
    shortest AS (SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE message_count > 0 ORDER BY message_count ASC LIMIT 1),
    no_model AS (SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE model IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1)
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (conversation_id)
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title, message_count AS msgs, model,
        project, is_pinned AS pinned, is_temporary AS temp,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM pinned_sample
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM in_project
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM standalone
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM longest
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM shortest
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM no_model
    )
    ORDER BY conversation_id
""").df()
show_df(sample_conv)
```

## 1.2 Messages

Mensagens user/assistant. Cada msg pode ter blocks de texto, **thinking**
(extended thinking), uploads (`asset_paths`), `attachment_names` (textos
extraidos), e participa de uma branch via `branch_id`.

```{python}
#| label: msg-schema

mcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        COUNT(thinking) AS thinking,
        COUNT(asset_paths) AS asset_paths,
        COUNT(attachment_names) AS attachment_names,
        COUNT(finish_reason) AS finish_reason,
        COUNT(content_types) AS content_types
    FROM messages
""").df()
mtotal = mcov["total"].iloc[0]

def msg_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(mcov[field].iloc[0]), int(mtotal))

schema_msg = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "ID unico (UUID)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "branch_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra branches (default `<conv>_main`)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "sequence", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Ordem cronologica dentro da conv (do raw `index`)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "role", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "'user' ou 'assistant' (mapeado de 'human'/'assistant')", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "content", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Concat dos blocks `text` (\\n\\n)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "model do conv quando role=assistant", "Cobertura": msg_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Hora da msg no servidor", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "word_count", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Calculado pelo parser", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "content_types", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "CSV de block types (text, thinking, tool_use, attachment, file)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("content_types")},
    {"Campo": "thinking", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Concat dos blocks `thinking` (extended thinking)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("thinking")},
    {"Campo": "attachment_names", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON array dos file_names dos uploads texto", "Cobertura": msg_cov("attachment_names")},
    {"Campo": "asset_paths", "Tipo": "list[str]?", "Descricao": "Paths em disco dos uploads binarios (imagens)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("asset_paths")},
    {"Campo": "finish_reason", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "stop_reason do servidor (stop_sequence, max_tokens, etc)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("finish_reason")},
])
show_df(schema_msg)
```

```{python}
#| label: msg-sample
#| column: page

sample_msg = con.execute("""
    WITH
    user_msg AS (SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='user' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
    assistant_msg AS (SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='assistant' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
    with_thinking AS (SELECT * FROM messages WHERE thinking IS NOT NULL ORDER BY length(thinking) DESC LIMIT 1),
    with_asset AS (SELECT * FROM messages WHERE asset_paths IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1),
    with_attach AS (SELECT * FROM messages WHERE attachment_names IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1),
    truncated AS (SELECT * FROM messages WHERE finish_reason='max_tokens' LIMIT 1)
    SELECT
        substr(message_id, 1, 8) AS msg_id, role,
        substr(content, 1, 60) AS content_preview,
        word_count AS wc, content_types,
        thinking IS NOT NULL AS has_think,
        asset_paths IS NOT NULL AS has_asset,
        attachment_names IS NOT NULL AS has_attach,
        finish_reason
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM user_msg
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM assistant_msg
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM with_thinking
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM with_asset
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM with_attach
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM truncated
    )
""").df()
show_df(sample_msg)
```

## 1.3 Tool Events

Cada bloco `tool_use` e `tool_result` da conv vira um ToolEvent. event_type
codifica categoria + direcao: `<categoria>_call` ou `<categoria>_result`.
MCP detectado via `integration_name` (Google Drive, Notion, etc — fica
prefixado com `mcp_*`).

```{python}
#| label: evt-schema

ecov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(tool_name) AS tool_name,
        COUNT(result) AS result,
        COUNT(metadata_json) AS metadata_json,
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_type LIKE 'mcp_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mcp,
        SUM(CASE WHEN success IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_set
    FROM tool_events
""").df()
etotal = ecov["total"].iloc[0]

def evt_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(ecov[field].iloc[0]), int(etotal))

schema_evt = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "event_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "tool_use_id ou tool_use_id+'_result'", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra messages (msg que gerou o block)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "event_type", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "<categoria>_call|_result. Categorias: search, code, artifact, computer_use, memory, research, mcp_*", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "tool_name", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Nome do tool (web_search, str_replace, google_drive_search, etc)", "Cobertura": evt_cov("tool_name")},
    {"Campo": "success", "Tipo": "bool?", "Descricao": "Inverso de is_error (so em tool_result)", "Cobertura": evt_cov("success_set")},
    {"Campo": "result", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Conteudo serializado do tool_result", "Cobertura": evt_cov("result")},
    {"Campo": "metadata_json", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON com input, integration_name, timestamps, etc", "Cobertura": evt_cov("metadata_json")},
    {"Campo": "MCP-prefixed events", "Tipo": "—", "Descricao": "Tools de integracoes externas (Google Drive, etc)", "Cobertura": fmt_pct(int(ecov["mcp"].iloc[0]), int(etotal))},
])
show_df(schema_evt)
```

```{python}
#| label: evt-sample

sample_evt = con.execute("""
    WITH
    search_call AS (SELECT * FROM tool_events WHERE event_type='search_call' LIMIT 1),
    artifact_call AS (SELECT * FROM tool_events WHERE event_type='artifact_call' LIMIT 1),
    code_call AS (SELECT * FROM tool_events WHERE event_type='code_call' LIMIT 1),
    mcp_call AS (SELECT * FROM tool_events WHERE event_type LIKE 'mcp_%_call' LIMIT 1),
    research_call AS (SELECT * FROM tool_events WHERE event_type='research_call' LIMIT 1)
    SELECT event_type, tool_name, substr(event_id, 1, 12) AS event_id_short
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM search_call
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM artifact_call
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM code_call
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM mcp_call
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM research_call
    )
""").df()
show_df(sample_evt)
```

## 1.4 Branches

Cada conv pode ter uma branch principal (`<conv>_main`) + N branches
secundarias (forks via "edit message"/regenerate). DAG plano via
`parent_message_uuid` + `current_leaf_message_uuid`.

```{python}
#| label: br-schema

bcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        SUM(is_active::INT) AS active,
        SUM((NOT is_active)::INT) AS inactive,
        COUNT(parent_branch_id) AS has_parent
    FROM branches
""").df()
btotal = bcov["total"].iloc[0]

schema_br = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "branch_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "`<conv>_main` ou `<conv>_branch_<short_uuid>`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "root_message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Primeiro msg da branch", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "leaf_message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Ultima msg (folha) da branch", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "is_active", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "True se eh a branch ativa (current_leaf na conv)", "Cobertura": fmt_pct(int(bcov['active'].iloc[0]), int(btotal))},
    {"Campo": "parent_branch_id", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Branch parent (geralmente main quando secundaria nasce de fork)", "Cobertura": fmt_pct(int(bcov['has_parent'].iloc[0]), int(btotal))},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "created_at do root da branch", "Cobertura": "100%"},
])
show_df(schema_br)
```

# 2. Cobertura e gaps

## 2.1 Convs sem `model`

```{python}
#| label: convs-no-model

no_model = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE model IS NULL) AS sem_model,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM conversations
""").df()
n_no = int(no_model["sem_model"].iloc[0])
n_total = int(no_model["total"].iloc[0])
print(f"Convs sem model: {fmt_pct(n_no, n_total)}")

if n_no:
    sample_no_model = con.execute("""
        SELECT
            substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
            title, message_count AS msgs,
            strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
        FROM conversations
        WHERE model IS NULL
        ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
    """).df()
    show_df(sample_no_model)
```

## 2.2 Cobertura de thinking (extended thinking)

```{python}
#| label: thinking-coverage

thinking_stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        role,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(thinking) AS with_thinking,
        ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(thinking) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct
    FROM messages GROUP BY role
""").df()
show_df(thinking_stats)
```

> **Observacao.** Thinking blocks aparecem so em mensagens do **assistant**.
> A cobertura indica a frequencia com que o modelo usou extended thinking.

## 2.3 Cobertura de asset_paths

```{python}
#| label: asset-coverage

asset_stats = con.execute("""
    WITH file_msgs AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages
        WHERE content_types LIKE '%file%'
    )
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS msgs_with_file_block,
        COUNT(asset_paths) AS resolved_asset_paths,
        COUNT(*) - COUNT(asset_paths) AS unresolved
    FROM file_msgs
""").df()
show_df(asset_stats)
```

> Mensagens com block `file` mas sem asset_paths sao casos onde o
> binario ainda nao foi baixado (ou falhou). Rodar
> `scripts/claude-download-assets.py` resolve os pendentes.

## 2.4 ToolEvents — calls vs results balance

```{python}
#| label: evt-balance

balance = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        REGEXP_REPLACE(event_type, '_(call|result)$', '') AS categoria,
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_type LIKE '%_call' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS calls,
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_type LIKE '%_result' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS results,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM tool_events
    GROUP BY categoria
    ORDER BY total DESC
""").df()
show_df(balance)
```

> Discrepancias entre `calls` e `results` indicam ou (a) tools sem
> response capturada, ou (b) tool_result.name diferente do
> tool_use.name (heuristica de classificacao precisa olhar
> `tool_use_id` em metadata).

# 3. Volumes e distribuicoes

## 3.1 Conversas criadas por mes

```{python}
#| label: conv-timeline

timeline = con.execute("""
    SELECT strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=timeline["mes"], y=timeline["n"],
    title=f"Conversas criadas por mes ({len(timeline)} meses cobertos)",
    height=350,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="Mes", type="category")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()
```

## 3.2 Mensagens por role

```{python}
#| label: msgs-by-role

by_role = con.execute("""
    SELECT role, COUNT(*) AS total,
           ROUND(AVG(word_count), 1) AS avg_words,
           SUM(CASE WHEN thinking IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_thinking
    FROM messages GROUP BY role
""").df()
show_df(by_role)

fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(name="Total", x=by_role["role"], y=by_role["total"], marker_color=SOURCE_COLOR))
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(name="Com thinking", x=by_role["role"], y=by_role["with_thinking"], marker_color=ACCENT))
fig.update_layout(
    barmode="group", title="Mensagens por role",
    height=300, template="plotly_white",
    margin=dict(t=50, b=40), legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.15),
)
fig.show()
```

## 3.3 ToolEvents por categoria

```{python}
#| label: events-by-type

evt_types = con.execute("""
    SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) AS n,
           COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) AS n_convs
    FROM tool_events GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()
show_df(evt_types)

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=evt_types["event_type"], y=evt_types["n"],
    title="ToolEvents por event_type",
    height=400,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="event_type", tickangle=-30)
fig.update_yaxes(title="N events")
fig.show()
```

## 3.4 MCP integrations detectadas

```{python}
#| label: mcp-integrations

mcps = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        json_extract_string(metadata_json, '$.integration_name') AS integration,
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) AS n_convs
    FROM tool_events
    WHERE metadata_json IS NOT NULL
      AND json_extract_string(metadata_json, '$.is_mcp')='true'
    GROUP BY integration
    ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

if not mcps.empty:
    show_df(mcps)
    fig = plotly_bar(
        x=mcps["n"], y=mcps["integration"],
        title=f"MCPs detectados ({len(mcps)} integracoes)",
        height=300, orientation="h",
    )
    fig.update_layout(yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"))
    fig.update_xaxes(title="N events")
    fig.update_yaxes(title="")
    fig.show()
else:
    print("Nenhum MCP detectado nesta base.")
```

## 3.5 Top tools (alem dos MCPs)

```{python}
#| label: top-tools

top_tools = con.execute("""
    SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS n FROM tool_events
    WHERE tool_name IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 15
""").df()
show_df(top_tools)
```

## 3.6 Modelos top

```{python}
#| label: top-models

top_models = con.execute("""
    SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    WHERE model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=top_models["model"], y=top_models["n"],
    title="Top modelos (Conversation.model = ultimo turn assistant)",
    height=350,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="model")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=-30)
fig.show()
```

## 3.7 Convs em projects vs standalone

```{python}
#| label: project-distrib

distrib = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN project_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Em project' ELSE 'Standalone' END AS categoria,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY categoria ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

fig = go.Figure(go.Pie(
    labels=distrib["categoria"], values=distrib["n"],
    marker=dict(colors=[SOURCE_COLOR, MUTED]),
    textinfo="label+percent+value",
))
fig.update_layout(
    title="Convs por categoria",
    height=350, template="plotly_white",
    margin=dict(t=50, b=40),
)
fig.show()
```

## 3.8 Top projects

```{python}
#| label: top-projects

top_projects = con.execute("""
    SELECT project, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    WHERE project IS NOT NULL GROUP BY project ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
""").df()

if not top_projects.empty:
    n_total = con.execute("SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT project) AS n FROM conversations WHERE project IS NOT NULL").df()["n"].iloc[0]
    fig = plotly_bar(
        x=top_projects["n"], y=top_projects["project"],
        title=f"Top projects (de {n_total} totais)",
        height=400, orientation="h",
    )
    fig.update_layout(yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"))
    fig.update_xaxes(title="N convs")
    fig.update_yaxes(title="")
    fig.show()
```

## 3.9 Distribuicao de tamanho (msgs por conv)

```{python}
#| label: size-histogram

sizes = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN message_count <= 5 THEN '1-5'
            WHEN message_count <= 10 THEN '6-10'
            WHEN message_count <= 20 THEN '11-20'
            WHEN message_count <= 50 THEN '21-50'
            WHEN message_count <= 100 THEN '51-100'
            WHEN message_count <= 200 THEN '101-200'
            ELSE '200+'
        END AS bin,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY bin
""").df()
order = ['1-5', '6-10', '11-20', '21-50', '51-100', '101-200', '200+']
sizes['bin'] = pd.Categorical(sizes['bin'], categories=order, ordered=True)
sizes = sizes.sort_values('bin')

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=sizes["bin"].astype(str), y=sizes["n"],
    title="Distribuicao de tamanho de conv (msgs visiveis na branch ativa)",
    height=300,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="N msgs por conv")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()

stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT MIN(message_count) AS min, MAX(message_count) AS max,
           ROUND(AVG(message_count), 1) AS avg, MEDIAN(message_count)::INT AS median
    FROM conversations
""").df()
show_df(stats)
```

## 3.10 Branches: forks por conv

```{python}
#| label: branches-fork-distrib

br_distrib = con.execute("""
    WITH counts AS (
        SELECT conversation_id, COUNT(*) AS n_branches
        FROM branches GROUP BY conversation_id
    )
    SELECT n_branches, COUNT(*) AS n_convs FROM counts
    GROUP BY n_branches ORDER BY n_branches
""").df()
show_df(br_distrib)

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=br_distrib["n_branches"].astype(str), y=br_distrib["n_convs"],
    title="Convs por numero de branches (1 = sem fork)",
    height=300,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="N branches na conv")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()
```

# 4. Conteudo rico — gap-fill v3.1

Campos adicionais alem do basic schema. Cobertos pelo parser apos
ajuste de spec do projeto-mae:

```{python}
#| label: rich-content-stats

stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN summary IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_summary,
        SUM(CASE WHEN settings_json IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_settings
    FROM conversations
""").df()
msg_stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total_msgs,
        SUM(CASE WHEN citations_json IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_citations,
        SUM(CASE WHEN attachments_json IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_attachments_json,
        SUM(CASE WHEN start_timestamp IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_block_ts
    FROM messages
""").df()
mcp_stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS mcp_events
    FROM tool_events
    WHERE event_type LIKE 'mcp_%'
""").df()

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "Conversation.summary", "Cobertura": int(stats.with_summary.iloc[0])},
    {"Campo": "Conversation.settings_json", "Cobertura": int(stats.with_settings.iloc[0])},
    {"Campo": "Message.citations_json", "Cobertura": int(msg_stats.with_citations.iloc[0])},
    {"Campo": "Message.attachments_json (com extracted_content)", "Cobertura": int(msg_stats.with_attachments_json.iloc[0])},
    {"Campo": "Message.start_timestamp/stop_timestamp (latencia por bloco)", "Cobertura": int(msg_stats.with_block_ts.iloc[0])},
    {"Campo": "ToolEvent MCP detection (3 sinais)", "Cobertura": int(mcp_stats.mcp_events.iloc[0])},
]))
```

## 4.1 Project docs (content inline)

Tabela auxiliar — uma row por knowledge file com **content extraido inline**.
Volume valida o achado do projeto-mae: ~23M chars em 546 docs.

```{python}
#| label: project-docs-stats

if _n_docs > 0:
    docs_stats = con.execute("""
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
            SUM(content_size) AS total_chars,
            ROUND(AVG(content_size), 0)::INT AS avg_chars,
            MAX(content_size) AS max_chars,
            COUNT(DISTINCT project_id) AS distinct_projects
        FROM project_docs
    """).df()
    show_df(docs_stats)

    top_docs = con.execute("""
        SELECT file_name, content_size, estimated_token_count,
               substr(project_id, 1, 8) AS proj_id
        FROM project_docs ORDER BY content_size DESC LIMIT 10
    """).df()
    show_df(top_docs)
else:
    print("Tabela project_docs ainda nao gerada. Rode scripts/claude-parse.py.")
```

## 4.2 Latencia de resposta (block timestamps)

```{python}
#| label: latency-distribution

lat = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        epoch(stop_timestamp - start_timestamp) AS latency_s,
        role
    FROM messages
    WHERE start_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND stop_timestamp IS NOT NULL
      AND role = 'assistant'
""").df()

if not lat.empty:
    bins = pd.cut(lat["latency_s"],
                  bins=[0, 5, 15, 30, 60, 120, 300, 600, 99999],
                  labels=["0-5s", "5-15s", "15-30s", "30-60s",
                          "1-2min", "2-5min", "5-10min", "10min+"])
    grp = bins.value_counts().sort_index()
    fig = plotly_bar(
        x=grp.index.astype(str), y=grp.values,
        title=f"Latencia assistant (start → stop block timestamps), n={len(lat):,}",
        height=300,
    )
    fig.update_xaxes(title="Janela de latencia")
    fig.update_yaxes(title="N msgs")
    fig.show()

    pct = lat["latency_s"].quantile([0.5, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99])
    show_df(pd.DataFrame([
        {"Percentil": f"P{int(p*100)}", "Latencia (s)": f"{v:.1f}"}
        for p, v in pct.items()
    ]))
```

# 5. Preservation

## 4.1 Active vs preserved_missing

```{python}
#| label: preservation-counts

preservation = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN is_preserved_missing THEN 'Preserved missing' ELSE 'Active' END AS status,
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        MIN(last_seen_in_server) AS first_seen,
        MAX(last_seen_in_server) AS last_seen
    FROM conversations GROUP BY is_preserved_missing
""").df()
show_df(preservation)
```

## 4.2 Pin / Temporary flags (cross-platform check)

Confirmacao do **cross-platform check** (CLAUDE.md): `is_starred` (raw)
mapeia pra `is_pinned` (canonico). `is_temporary` preservado in-place.

```{python}
#| label: pin-temp-stats

pin_stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        SUM(is_pinned::INT) AS pinned,
        SUM(is_temporary::INT) AS temporary,
        SUM(is_archived::INT) AS archived,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM conversations
""").df()
show_df(pin_stats)
```

```{python}
#| label: pinned-list

pinned = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title, message_count AS msgs,
        strftime(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS last_update,
        project
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_pinned ORDER BY updated_at DESC
""").df()
if not pinned.empty:
    show_df(pinned)
else:
    print("Nenhuma conv pinada nesta base.")
```

## 4.3 Project metadata

```{python}
#| label: project-stats

if con.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_metadata").fetchone()[0] > 0:
    project_stats = con.execute("""
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total,
            SUM(is_starred::INT) AS pinned,
            SUM(is_starter_project::INT) AS starter,
            SUM(CASE WHEN archived_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS archived,
            SUM(docs_count) AS total_docs,
            SUM(files_count) AS total_files
        FROM project_metadata
    """).df()
    show_df(project_stats)

    top_proj = con.execute("""
        SELECT name, docs_count, files_count,
               strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
        FROM project_metadata
        ORDER BY (docs_count + files_count) DESC LIMIT 10
    """).df()
    show_df(top_proj)
```
